_comment: Lean library registry — the (library, decl) pair is the universal L1 join key (docs/research/mathdb-unification-research.json). Every doc-gen4 site serves declarations/declaration-data.bmp (JSON despite the extension, CORS *). module_roots filters each site's index to the library's OWN decls (each site bundles Mathlib+core: cslib's index is 231k decls of which 3.2k are its own). aliases record renames (Physlib was HEPLean then PhysLean) so old references stay resolvable. enabled=false keeps a library registered but unfetched (lean-pool: 52k decls of mixed-tier student projects — listed, not yet served).

libraries.label: Mathlib
libraries.note: primary — served by the sharded decl-index asset, not the KV blob

libraries.label: lean-pool
libraries.note: student-project tier; enable after per-project quality gating is designed
